mapper.sql: mco.campaign_id AS sn_metric_campaign_optin_campaign_id, mco.node_id AS sn_metric_campaign_optin_node_id, mco.source_id AS sn_metric_campaign_optin_source_id, mco.prop_type AS sn_metric_campaign_optin_prop_type, mco.prop_name AS sn_metric_campaign_optin_prop_name, mco.created AS sn_metric_campaign_optin_created
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM solarnet.sn_metric_campaign_optin mco ORDER BY
mco.created DESC
mco.campaign_id, mco.node_id, mco.source_id, mco.prop_type, mco.prop_name
